body:
If you need a garage door fixed today in Pleasanton, these companies advertise same-day or emergency service and are currently open:

  * Valiant Garage Door — Open 24 hours. Offers same-day repair for broken springs, openers, cables, off-track doors, and other common issues, subject to technician and parts availability. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Precision Garage Door Service — Open daily (5:00 AM–11:00 PM). Same-day repairs for springs, openers, cables, and other garage door problems. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * The Door Doctor — Open 24 hours. Provides emergency spring replacement, opener installation, and residential/commercial garage door repair. [HOME | The Door Doctor](https://www.thedoordoctors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * AE Garage Door Repair Pleasanton — Open daily (8:00 AM–8:00 PM). Local repair service with strong customer ratings.

  * Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC (nearby in Dublin) — Open 7:00 AM–7:00 PM with a large number of highly rated reviews.

If your garage door is stuck open, won't close, has a broken spring, or came off its track, avoid forcing it open or closed, as that can cause additional damage or create a safety hazard.

If you tell me what's wrong with the door (for example, broken spring, opener not working, door off track, or door won't open), I can help you determine which type of service you need and what a typical repair might cost.
